name: Freezer Mix All-American Hot Dish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Ripe olives, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook freezer mix in a large skillet until meat is browned. Drain off excess fat.
2. Stir in corn (with its liquid), and the remaining ingredients.
3. To cook in skillet: Heat mixture to boiling. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally, until noodles are tender, about 20 minutes.
4. To cook in oven: Pour mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Uncover and bake until the mixture thickens, about 15 minutes.
